message:
fix(pages): harden decrypt, preview server, and clean up exclusion API

Encryption (pages/encrypt.rs):
- Add directory traversal validation in DecryptionEngine before reading
  chunk files. Reject any chunk_file path containing ".." or that
  resolves to an absolute path. This prevents a malicious payload
  manifest from reading arbitrary files on disk during decryption.

Preview server (pages/preview.rs):
- Set a 5-second read timeout on incoming TCP connections so slow or
  abandoned clients cannot block the handler thread indefinitely.
- Add an explicit stream.shutdown(Both) call after flushing the
  response, with a clarifying comment. The shutdown was already present
  but lacked context about its purpose.

Summary exclusions (pages/summary.rs):
- Rename matches_pattern() to is_excluded() for clarity — the method
  name now describes intent (should this title be excluded?) rather than
  mechanism (does it match a pattern?).
- Reorder add_pattern() and is_excluded() methods for better logical
  grouping: query methods together, mutation methods together.
- Update all call sites in should_exclude() and tests accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
